page: Microsoft Azure DC2es_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV5 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel processor. The instance features 2 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory allocation of 4.0 GB per core. It runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is premium storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external storage volumes.

With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio, the DC2es_v5 offers predictable compute performance for entry-level workloads. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-efficient option for workloads that do not require high-speed local scratch space or hardware acceleration, allowing users to pay only for the core compute and memory resources. This instance is suitable for small-scale databases, web serving, lightweight enterprise applications, and general-purpose development or testing environments that require dedicated CPU resources without the overhead of shared-core burstable models.
description: The Microsoft Azure DC2es_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCEV5 family, powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it supports premium storage options for attaching external high-performance volumes. Designed for predictable performance without the resource contention of shared-core models, the DC2es_v5 offers a cost-efficient entry point for dedicated compute resources. It is well-suited for lightweight workloads such as small-scale databases, web serving, development environments, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC2es_v5 is a DCEV5 family virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and premium storage capability for general-purpose and memory-optimized workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual machine with balanced memory allocation and premium storage support for predictable general-purpose workloads.
